thought.text: Let me add debug output to find the exact crash location:

reasoning_content: Let me add debug fprintf statements to find where the crash happens. I already determined before that the crash happens in the VarDecl handler when mCurFunc is not null but not properly set up. Let me look at the JSON structure for func_defn more carefully.

action.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 << 'PYEOF'
# Add debug fprintf to track execution flow
with open('task/3/EmitIR.cpp', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Add debug at key points
# TranslationUnit
content = content.replace(
    'for (auto&& i : tu->decls)\n    self(i);',
    'for (auto&& i : tu->decls) {\n    fprintf(stderr, "TU: decl name=%s\\n", i->name.c_str());\n    self(i);\n  }'
)

# VarDecl
content = content.replace(
    'void\nEmitIR::operator()(VarDecl* obj)\n{\n  // 全局变量\n  if (mCurFunc == nullptr) {',
    'void\nEmitIR::operator()(VarDecl* obj)\n{\n  fprintf(stderr, "VarDecl: name=%s mCurFunc=%p init=%p\\n", obj->name.c_str(), (void*)mCurFunc, (void*)obj->init);\n  // 全局变量\n  if (mCurFunc == nullptr) {'
)

# DeclRefExpr
content = content.replace(
    'llvm::Value*\nEmitIR::operator()(DeclRefExpr* obj)\n{\n  auto decl = obj->decl;',
    'llvm::Value*\nEmitIR::operator()(DeclRefExpr* obj)\n{\n  auto decl = obj->decl;\n  fprintf(stderr, "DeclRefExpr: decl=%p name=%s\\n", (void*)decl, decl ? decl->name.c_str() : "null");'
)

# FunctionDecl entry
content = content.replace(
    '  auto fty = llvm::dyn_cast<llvm::FunctionType>(self(obj->type));\n  auto func = llvm::Function::Create(',
    '  fprintf(stderr, "FunctionDecl: name=%s body=%p params=%zu\\n", obj->name.c_str(), (void*)obj->body, obj->params.size());\n  auto fty = llvm::dyn_cast<llvm::FunctionType>(self(obj->type));\n  auto func = llvm::Function::Create('
)

with open('task/3/EmitIR.cpp', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)
print("Debug added")
PYEOF

tool_call.name: terminal
